data.title: Retail investors turned to Bitcoin and Ether post October crash, compounding troubles for altcoins in 2021.
data.description: After the October 2020 cryptocurrency market crash, retail traders turned to Bitcoin and Ether, contributing to the challenges faced by alternative coins. The decline in altcoins' value was exacerbated by this trend, with Bitcoin and Ether emerging as more favored options for investors. This shift saw a significant increase in trading volume for Bitcoin and Ether, with numbers reaching a peak amidst the ongoing market volatility.

data.title: Safe2core is offering free hydro excavation estimates for utility work in Sacramento and Northern California. (Character count: 91)
data.description: Receive complimentary estimates for hydro excavation services for utility potholing, daylighting, and SUE Level A verification in Sacramento and Northern California. The announcement was made in SACRAMENTO, Calif., on Jan. 13, 2026. This offer comes as construction and infrastructure endeavors in Northern California see ongoing growth.

data.title: FPT named Major Contender in Everest Group Digital Transformation Services for Mid-market Enterprises PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025.
data.description: A company based in Hanoi, Vietnam, FPT, a global IT services provider, has recently been recognized as a Major Contender in the Everest Group Digital Transformation Services for Mid-market Enterprises PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025. This assessment reviewed 24 global providers offering digital transformation services for mid-market enterprises. The evaluation categorized providers into Leaders, Major Contenders, Aspirants, and Star Performers by analyzing their market impact, vision, capabilities, and performance. FPT's standout performance in this evaluation highlights its competitive position among global providers in the digital transformation services sector.

data.title: Cryptocurrency bettors predict low odds of Supreme Court favoring Trump's tariffs. Odds at 28%, with $2.6 million on the line. Story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: The cryptocurrency prediction market is indicating low chances of the Supreme Court ruling in favor of President Donald Trump's tariffs, with only a 28% likelihood of the court overturning or vacating the previous decision deeming the policy unconstitutional. This percentage has increased from 22% last week but remains significantly below the peak in September 2025. Over $2.6 million has been wagered on this outcome, making it a heavily traded bet on the Polygon platform. The decision is expected to be announced on Wednesday. For additional information, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric will ship 4 new SiC-MOSFET bare dies for power electronics starting Jan 21, designed for EVs and renewable energy.
data.description: In Tokyo, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation (TOKYO: 6503) disclosed that they will commence the distribution of samples for four fresh trench silicon carbide metal-oxide-semiconductor field-effect transistor (SiC-MOSFET) bare dies from January 21. These chips are tailored for power electronics applications, like EV traction inverters, onboard chargers, and power supply units for renewable energy sources like solar power.
